programme.title: D-Day: The Untold Stories
programme.desc: (M) To commemorate the 75th anniversary of D-Day, this special presents the key events of the Allied invasion of Nazi-held Europe; the subsequent battles captured control of Normandy.

programme.title: Hiroshima: 75 Years Later
programme.desc: (M) Examine one of the most shocking moments in wartime history - from the making of the atomic bombs to the devastation that they caused.

programme.title: The L.A. Riots: 25 Years Later
programme.desc: (MA) A documentary marking the 25th anniversary of the infamous L.A. riots that reexamines the intense and life-changing events through the eyes of those who lived it.

programme.title: Hidden White House
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
